reviews.title: Charged me three months after I cancelled
reviews.body: Cancelled my Lebara plan in January. They continued charging my card until April. Raised a dispute with my bank and Lebara disputed the chargeback. Absolute disgrace. Stay away. Customer service is impossible to reach and when you do, they just repeat scripted responses.
reviews.author: Mark S.

reviews.title: eSIM billing complaints — unexpected roaming charges
reviews.body: I'm on the eSIM plan. Hit my data cap on a trip to France and got charged £45 in roaming fees with no prior warning. Not even a text. The plan description implied data would stop at the cap. This needs urgent fixing.
reviews.author: Priya N.

reviews.title: Great value SIM for international calls
reviews.body: Been with Lebara for 3 years. Mainly use it for calling Pakistan and it's fantastic for that — clear calls, competitive rates. Would be 5 stars if the data speeds were better but for calls it's unbeatable value in the UK.
reviews.author: Ahmed R.

reviews.title: Account locked for no reason, can't access anything
reviews.body: My account got locked after I tried to update my payment method. I've been unable to make or receive calls for 5 days. Tried online chat, phone, and email. Phone wait times are over an hour and the chat bot is useless. No resolution.
reviews.author: Fatima K.

reviews.title: Data speeds are terrible in Birmingham
reviews.body: Have been using Lebara for 6 months. The calls are fine but 4G data speeds are consistently under 5 Mbps in central Birmingham. Other networks on the same masts are getting 50+ Mbps. Something is wrong with their network prioritisation.
reviews.author: Jason M.

reviews.title: Cheap plan, works for basic use
reviews.body: £5/month for calls and 2GB data. Does what it says. I don't use much data so the speeds don't bother me. International minutes to India are included which saves me money. Not glamorous but it works for me.
reviews.author: Rani P.

reviews.title: Porting my number took 3 weeks and multiple failures
reviews.body: Tried to port my existing number to Lebara. They failed the port twice, left me without service for 4 days the first time. Eventually escalated to a complaints manager who sorted it. The whole process should take 1 working day, not 3 weeks.
reviews.author: Thomas B.

reviews.title: Random top-up charges appearing on my bill
reviews.body: I'm on a monthly bundle but random top-up charges keep appearing — £2 here, £3 there. When I queried them, support said they were for premium SMS services I never signed up to. It took two months to get the charges reversed and the services blocked.
reviews.author: Claire H.

reviews.title: Good for what it is — a budget SIM
reviews.body: If you go in expecting a premium experience, you'll be disappointed. But as a cheap SIM for secondary use, it's fine. Coverage in London is decent, customer service is slow but not non-existent. Worth the price.
reviews.author: Dan W.

reviews.title: Impossible to cancel — keep taking payments
reviews.body: Tried to cancel online — the button doesn't work. Tried by phone — was put on hold for 90 minutes then disconnected. Emailed — got an automated response and no follow-up. They are still taking my direct debit. This is theft.
reviews.author: Wendy A.

reviews.title: Network coverage dropped significantly since March
reviews.body: Was perfectly happy for 2 years. Since March 2026, I'm regularly losing signal in areas where I used to have full bars. Particularly bad in South London. Called support and they said there's no known issue. Something has changed.
reviews.author: Kevin O.

reviews.title: Excellent international call quality
reviews.body: The whole reason I use Lebara is the international calling rates. Crystal clear calls to Nigeria at a fraction of what BT charges. Data is slow but I use WiFi for everything except calls. For my use case, it's perfect.
reviews.author: Grace A.

reviews.title: eSIM not working after phone upgrade — no support
reviews.body: Got a new iPhone, transferred my Lebara eSIM profile. New phone says the eSIM is invalid. Support chat couldn't resolve it, said I'd need to buy a new eSIM. I've been a customer for 4 years and they want me to pay again because I got a new phone.
reviews.author: Stuart L.

reviews.title: Works fine, nothing special
reviews.body: Basic SIM, does what it says. Coverage is fine in Manchester. Data isn't the fastest but usable. Had no billing issues in 8 months. Customer service was helpful when I had a question about my plan. No strong feelings either way.
reviews.author: Amy C.

reviews.title: Direct debit taken twice in one month
reviews.body: In May they took my monthly direct debit twice — once on the 1st and once on the 15th. Raised a complaint. Was told one payment would be refunded within 5-7 days. It's been 3 weeks. Still waiting. Avoid direct debit if you use Lebara.
reviews.author: Robert D.

reviews.title: Best value international SIM in the UK
reviews.body: Sending money home to Bangladesh and calling family — Lebara covers both with the cheapest rates I've found. The data is slow, I admit that. But I'm on WiFi at home and work, so I only need data for maps and messages when out. Suits me perfectly.
reviews.author: Nasrin B.
